Halt TX

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0xa4
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Halts transmission to allow the TX FIFO to be filled in test mode. Has no effect when FIFOs are not enabled.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:1] reserved rw 0x0 -
[0] htx rw 0x0 HTX

Field Descriptions

htx - HTX

Halt TX. 0=normal operation, 1=transmission halted.
